results.title: RSG Commends Anglican Church’s Contributions To State’s Dev
results.description: ?The Rivers State Government has expressed appreciation to the Church of Nigeria (Anglican Communion) for its significant contributions to the growth and development of the state. ? ?Governor of Rivers State, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, said the Church remains a critical partner in promoting peace, unity, justice, moral values, and social harmony across society. ? ?The [...]

results.title: Almost 1000 arrests in domestic violence blitz
results.description: More than 900 people have been arrested and almost 100 guns seized in a four-day blitz targeting those with a history of domestic violence.

results.title: Economic literacy and Nigeria’s fiscal critics
results.description: By Tanimu Yakubu Those who speak glibly about deficits, debt and fiscal expansion often reveal not economic sophistication but economic illiteracy disguised as moral outrage. Much of today’s opposition rhetoric confuses accounting identities with ideological slogans and mistakes macroeconomic intervention for recklessness. A modern economy is not managed through market romanticism. It is managed through [...] The post Economic literacy and Nigeria’s fiscal critics appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: Hasaacas Ladies beat Army Ladies on penalties to win Women’s FA Cup
results.description: The Hasmal Ladies won 5-3 on penalties after the two teams had played out a 1-1 draw in 120 minutes of play.

results.description: Delhi Capitals skipper Axar Patel described the team's five-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals on Sunday as a special win, particularly as it came at home

results.title: Imwe ba Katakwe ngeyo behaviour?
results.description: During his farewell media engagement on Thursday, outgoing Health Minister Dr Alex Katakwe advised senior officials to eat “panono panono,” suggesting that there was nothing wrong with anyone scratching their backs once they’ve done the same to theirs. However, State House has since distanced itself from the remarks attributed to Katakwe. In a statement issued [...]

results.title: Perth traffic: Commuter chaos with heavy delays on Guildford Road, Mitchell and Kwinana freeways
results.description: Commuters have been warned to brace for heavy delays across the metropolitan area after a number of early morning crashes and breakdowns on major arterial roads.

results.title: Mitchell Starc takes four wickets as Delhi Capitals beat Rajasthan Royals by five wickets
results.description: Veteran seamer Mitchell Starc credited Delhi Capitals' disciplined bowling and adaptability after his four-wicket haul helped secure a five-wicket victory

results.title: Gentrack buys utility pricing platform Factor for $24m
results.description: Utility software developer Gentrack has reported a $5.11 million profit after tax, down on $7.18m on the same period last year.
